description: Tightened CI proximity search, corpus curation, text preprocessor integration
changes: CI proximity window reduced from 500 to 150 chars
CI label required for unlabeled patterns
Negative validation rejects CI belonging to different value
Text preprocessor integrated (Unicode, dehyphenation, column reorder)
7 additional validated PDFs downloaded via FTP
10 PDFs designated as held-out test set

comparison_to_v434.note: 0.908 is more trustworthy than 0.923 due to tighter validation
